description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and runs bundle install in a before_script for every job. Define the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8 and two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, saves the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
